title: helichrysum korongoni
intro: Helichrysum korongoni, also known as the yellow-flowering helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum korongoni include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum korongoni include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
